markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review new content ideas to drive more website clicks and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** Double down on high-CTR topics (GPT, fraud) and test new formats (career guides, CISO newsletters) to scale traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**CISO Newsletter Pilot:** Pilot Substack newsletters for CISOs Mike Leach and Patricia, using AI to repurpose their content and drive traffic to the Abnormal blog.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [**YouTube SEO Support:** GrowthX will provide SEO descriptions for Abnormal's YouTube videos to improve organic search discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [**Content Team Review:** Emily's team (Emily, Callie, Megan) will review all proposals next week to align on a final strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Strategic Direction

  - [**Performance:** Engaged impressions grew 38% WoW (vs. 34% last week).](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**CTR Insights:**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**High-CTR Pages:** Blog, repository comparisons, and CISO pages.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Top 6 Pages:** All contain "GPT" (e.g., `worm GPT`).](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:** Drive more clicks and business leads, with clicks as the primary metric.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### New Content Initiatives

  - [**1. High-CTR Topic Expansion**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Double down on proven topics (GPT, fraud, scams) that convert well.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
      - [**Execution:** Use the glossary format for terms not directly tied to the Abnormal solution (e.g., `Hack GPT`) to avoid brand confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [**2. B2C Keyword Exploration**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture high-volume B2C traffic (e.g., `spam email`) to meet volume goals.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Trade-off:** Higher volume, but less persona-specific.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [**Example:** "Microsoft email scams" article drove significant growth.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [**3. "Cyber Career Guide" Content Branch**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Proposal:** A new content hub targeting cybersecurity career keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High volume, low-to-medium keyword difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Initial Concern (Abdallah):** Attracting job-seekers, not prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Resolution:** Test the concept and track traffic behavior (e.g., time on site) to validate the audience.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**4. Webinar & Podcast Repurposing**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [**Webinars:** Create blog posts from webinars to drive traffic to the full recording.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [**Podcasts:** Emily's team will continue managing podcast recap blogs. GrowthX can provide SEO optimization support.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [**5. CISO-Authored Substack Newsletters**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Launch personal Substack newsletters for CISOs Mike Leach and Patricia.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [**Execution:** GrowthX will use AI to repurpose their content (podcasts, webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Newsletters will be branded to the CISOs (e.g., "Mike Leach from Abnormal") to build their personal brands while clearly sponsored by Abnormal.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive clicks to the main Abnormal blog.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### Content Operations

  - [**Reddit Strategy:** Focus on monitoring ICP subreddits for content ideas, not just brand mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Medium Workflow:** Engineering will provide a timeline for repurposing the Medium workflow by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Content Refresh:** Proceed with approved content refreshes. Emily's team will review retroactively to avoid blocking publication.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [**YouTube SEO:** GrowthX will provide SEO descriptions for Abnormal's YouTube videos to improve organic search discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
      - [Book a meeting with Abdallah for next Wednesday (12:00/12:30 PM) to review Talal's estimations.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
      - [Create a sample Substack newsletter for Mike Leach to present to him and Patricia.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
      - [Provide YouTube SEO best practices and confirm support for writing video descriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [**Abnormal:**](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Emily's team (Emily, Callie, Megan) will meet next week to review all content proposals and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/fZCh4ZUjs-Hgr5pv4WxpVcaxZyMozZn6?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
